lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Panther Clipper Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Panther Clipper Mk II
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, cargo capacity, hardpoint layout, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Panther Clipper Mk II
sources.what: Zorgon Peterson lore, freighter role, and the ship's spec reference.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Cargo-focused look at the Panther Clipper Mk II, making the case for it as a dedicated trading hull.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Full review of the Panther Clipper Mk II, covering its strengths and weaknesses as the largest cargo hauler.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: Launch-day overview of the Panther Clipper Mk II, its arrival and standing as the biggest cargo ship in the game.
